title: orthospermum glaucum
intro: Orthospermum glaucum, also known as Blue Fleabane, is a perennial herb native to Australia, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Orthospermum glaucum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in topical applications for skin conditions.
